name: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
description: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom creates a miranda flower on the chest of the caster before calling down a rain of pillars of light.
location:
Where to find Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom: 
 Found on a corpse near a Giant Miranda Sprout in the upper portions of Rauh Ruins. Starting at the "Rauh Ancient Ruins, East" Site of Grace, cross the bridge to the southwest. As soon as you get to the end of the bridge, but before going up the steps, turn north and keep going until you get to a gap that can be double jumped with Torrent. The incantation is on the other side. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
description: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns covers the caster's back with thorns before .
location:
Where to find Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns: 
 Dropped by the Golden Hippopotamus by going up the elevator in the Shadow Keep Main Gate. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Bayle's Flame Lightning
description: Bayle's Flame Lightning is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Bayle's Flame Lightning channels the talon bone of the dread dragon and smashes enemies with right arm coursing with flame lightning.
location:
Where to find Bayle's Flame Lightning: 
 Trade Heart of Bayle at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion for Bayle's Flame Lightning or Bayle's Tyranny. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Bayle's Tyranny
description: Bayle's Tyranny is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Bayle's Tyranny is one of the most powerful Dragon Communion Incantations, emiting a mighty roar followed by a heatwave burst.
location:
Where to find Bayle's Tyranny: 
 Trade Heart of Bayle at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion for Bayle's Flame Lightning or Bayle's Tyranny. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Divine Beast Tornado
description: Divine Beast Tornado is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Divine Beast Tornado conjures a whirlwind and then launches a tornado forward.
location:
Where to find Divine Beast Tornado: 
 Ancient Ruins of Rauh: Dropped from the Divine Beast Dancing Lion found northeast from the "Temple Town Ruins" Site of Grace. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Divine Bird Feathers
description: Divine Bird Feathers is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Divine Bird Feathers spell relases a flurry of feathers that inflict damage.
location:
Where to find Divine Bird Feathers: 
 Ancient Ruins of Rauh: From the "Church of the Bud, Main Entrance" Site of Grace, head north into the building, east down the central stairway and then south to go outside. Go past the gazebo and look at the corpse in the middle of the water which contains the incantation.[See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Dragonbolt of Florissax
description: Dragonbolt of Florissax is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Dragonbolt of Florissax calls down red lightning to increase of all forms of damage negation on both the caster and any nearby allies.
location:
Where to find Dragonbolt of Florissax: 
 Received from Dragon Communion Priestess after giving her Thiollier's Concoction at night and progressing her questline. 
NOTE: Please be mindful that if you take these steps, you will lock yourself out of her other rewards: Flowerstone Gavel and Priestess Heart. Also note that the Gavel is her only reward which can be dropped from other players. 
  
  See Steps (click to reveal) 
  
      
    
    Progress through Thiollier's Questline until you get Thiollier's Concoction. Do NOT use it on yourself, or just buy more from his shop. 
    Head towards the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion at the Dragon's Pit and talk to the Dragon Communion Priestess exhausting her dialogues. [Map Link] 
    Pass time to night. You will find the Dragon Communion Priestess praying. 
    GIVE HER THE THIOLLIER'S CONCOCTION TO MAKE HER SLEEP. 
    Pass time to day. (May need 2 days before she wakes up) 
    Speak with the Dragon Communion Priestess and exhaust her dialogue. 
    Climb to the summit of Jagged Peak. 
    Defeat Bayle the Dread (Summon Igon to ensure you get his loot too, but it's not necessary for the Incantation) 
    Teleport to the Altar and talk to the priestess. She rewards you with Dragonbolt of Florissax and now you can also obtain the Ancient Dragon Florissax Spirit Ashes.

name: Electrocharge
description: Electrocharge is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Electrocharge charges the caster's body with lightning, emitting electric shocks in the surrounding area.
location:
Where to find Electrocharge: 
 Fog Rift Catacombs: After the second lift down, continue the path until you find a giant hall room with giant spike ceiling traps. In the second alcove on the left is a hole. Drop down it to find yourself in a watery area, head left into the side room and turn left again to find yourself in a small room with two Putrescent Mages surrounded by Yellow Fulgurbloom flowers. You'll find a body laying down containing the Electrocharge spell. [Elden Ring Map] [Video Link]

name: Fire Serpent
description: Fire Serpent is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Fire Serpent creates a serpentine flame that bends and curls, pursuing the target.
location:
Where to find Fire Serpent: 
 Shadow Keep: From the "Storehouse, Backsection" Site of Grace, climb up the very long ladder, pass the enemies, and move forward past the book reading shades until you reach the balcony. You will find the item there. [Map Link] [Video Location]

name: Furious Blade of Ansbach
description: Furious Blade of Ansbach is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Furious Blade of Ansbach cleaves through enemies with a Bloodflame Blade created from the side of the hand.
location:
Where to find Furious Blade of Ansbach: 
 Complete Sir Ansbach's questline all the way through the end, and side with him when facing Leda. After the Final Boss fight is over, reload the area and Sir Ansbach's body can be found inside the arena, near the entrance, containing his Equipment and this Incantation. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Ghostflame Breath
description: Ghostflame Breath is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Ghostflame Breath conjures the head of a Ghostflame Dragon to spew destructive ghostflame breath from above.
location:
Where to find Ghostflame Breath: 
 Can be purchased at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion for 3x Dragon Hearts. Defeating a Ghostflame Dragon is not required in order to unlock this Incantation. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Giant Golden Arc
description: Giant Golden Arc is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Giant Golden Arc fires a giant golden arc that tracks towards enemies.
location:
Where to find Giant Golden Arc: 
 Ruins of Unte: East of the "Castle Watering Hole" Site of Grace is a deactivated Furnace Golem blocking entrance to an area. [Elden Ring Map] 
   
   To access the blocked area, you need to throw a Hefty Furnace Pot inside the golem's furnace so that it awakens and frees the entrance. 
   To do so, find your way atop the left building and throw the pot from there. Do note that the activated golem will attack you.   
    
 Alternatively, you can access the blocked area by using Torrent to jump in from the back corner of the building near the break in the wall. You will have to do a series of tricky jumps up the column, and then to the right and over the wall.

name: Golden Arcs
description: Golden Arcs is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Golden Arcs releases a procession of three golden arcs towards foes.
location:
Where to find Golden Arcs: 
 Moorth Ruins: From the Ruins Site of Grace, head southeast past the arched building, you'll see another collapsed building with a small entrance. Inside it you'll find a large crater with a some rooftops you can walk into. There, head to the left where you'll find a corpse with the Shattered Stone Talisman. Drop down into the nearest platform (Note you will take some fall damage). To the east, right below your platform, is a small church with three Inquisitors outside it. Inside is a chest containing this Incantation. [Map Link]

name: Heal from Afar
description: Heal from Afar is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Heal from Afar allows the caster to fire a projectile that heals allies on contact.
location:
Where to find Heal from Afar: 
 Can be looted on the ground by the foot of an underground golden tree. It is located in a cave path to the base of the Rauh Ruins, north-northeast of the Moorth Ruins in Scadu Altus. [Map Link]

name: Knight's Lightning Spear
description: Knight's Lightning Spear is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Knight's Lightning Spear shoots a lightning spear at enemies followed by additional spears that track the target.
location:
Where to find Knight's Lightning Spear: 
 Scorpion River Catacombs: In the big hall with the second set of eyes, which you reach by climbing the ladder on the northern side of the room where you get the Black Knight Captain Huw ashes. Run across the bridge in front of the giant eyes and sprint across the narrow pathway on the right. Behind the eyes, you'll then see the Incantation in between two Imps.[See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Land of Shadow (Incantation)
description: Land of Shadow is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Land of Shadow creates golden projectiles which fire at enemies after a small delay.
location:
Where to find Land of Shadow: 
 Trade Remembrance of the Shadow Sunflower with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.

name: Light of Miquella
description: Light of Miquella is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Light of Miquella creates a massive pillar of light.
location:
Where to find Light of Miquella: 
 Trade Remembrance of a God and a Lord with Enia at Roundtable Hold. The other two options are Greatsword of Radahn (Light) and Greatsword of Radahn (Lord).

name: Midra's Flame of Frenzy
description: Midra's Flame of Frenzy is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Midra's Flame of Frenzy conjures an apparition of the Lord of Frenzied Flame's head that spews its frenzied flame as long as the caster withstands.
location:
Where to find Midra's Flame of Frenzy: 
 Trade Remembrance of the Lord of Frenzied Flame with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.

name: Messmer's Orb
description: Messmer's Orb is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Messmer's Orb makes the caster jump in the air and create a giant floating orb in their hand, soaring towards foes before exploding after a short time.
location:
Where to find Messmer's Orb: 
 Trade Remembrance of the Impaler with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.

name: Minor Erdtree
description: Minor Erdtree is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Summons a small, illusory tree in front of the caster that restores HP in an area.
location:
Where to find Minor Erdtree: 
 Located at the Shaman Village in the Scaduview region. Found in the middle of the glowing field of flowers.[Map Link]

name: Multilayered Ring of Light
description: Multilayered Ring of Light is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Multilayered Ring of Light fires off a ring of light that stays in place upon hitting its target, continuously dealing damage.
location:
Where to find Multilayered Ring of Light: 
 Rewarded upon defeating the Spirit Misbegotten Crusader in the Stone Coffin Fissure. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Pest-Thread Spears
description: Pest-Thread Spears is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Pest-Thread Spears secretes sticky threads that then twist into two spears and launch frontwards.
location:
Where to find Pest-Thread Spears: 
 Ancient Ruins of Rauh: From the "Church of the Bud, Main Entrance" Site of Grace, head back into the cave and down the stairs, head behind the stairs and the incantation will be directly behind it, guarded by Kindred of Rot. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Rain of Fire
description: Rain of Fire is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Rain of Fire conjures a massive cloud of flame above enemies that rains fire for a short period of time.
location:
Where to find Rain of Fire: 
 Shadow Keep: From the "West Rampart" Site of Grace, take the bridge all the way. Be wary of bat enemies and at some point you'll notice a Fire Knight conjuring the Rain of Fire at you. Use the environment to hide from the rain or use Torrent to rush to the Fire Knight at the end of the bridge to obtain this Incantation and the Salza's Hood. [Map Link]

name: Roar of Rugalea
description: Roar of Rugalea is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Roar of Rugalea spell emits a powerful roar that deals damage.
location:
Where to find Roar of Rugalea: 
 Dropped by Rugalea the Great Red Bear, located northwest of the "Ravine North" Site of Grace, in the wooded area with many Runebears on Rauh Base. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Rotten Butterflies
description: Rotten Butterflies is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Rotten Butterflies spell summons a myriad of butterflies, that once make contact, break apart scattering rot and starting a chain reaction.
location:
Where to find Rotten Butterflies: 
 Trade Remembrance of the Saint of the Bud with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.

name: Spira
description: Spira is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Spira continuously conjures spirals of light that erupts at the enemy's feet.
location:
Where to find Spira: 
 Enir-Ilim: From the "First Rise" Site of Grace, head to the west door into the area crowded with Inquisitors, to the upper left is a staircase going up with two Inquisitors. Take it and follow its path, turning right towards the tree. Drop down into the lower branches and follow the right one which takes you into a small platform with a single Inquisitor praying to a statue. The Incantation is in front of it. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Watchful Spirit
description: Watchful Spirit is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Watchful Spirit summons a Skull Spirit above the caster's head, shooting several projectiles towards foes.
location:
Where to find Watchful Spirit: 
 Belurat Tower Settlement: Given by Hornsent Grandam after defeating the Divine Beast Dancing Lion. Talk to her twice while wearing the Divine Beast Head to receive this Incantation. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Wrath from Afar
description: Wrath from Afar is an Incantation in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Wrath from Afar spell fires a golden shockwave that knocks backs foes
location:
Where to find Wrath from Afar: 
  Shadow Keep: Take the elevator at the "Storehouse, Loft" Site of Grace. Once you are on the upper level, head left and cross to the other side where you'll see a ladder, beware of the bat hanging from the ceiling. Climb up the ladder and head left until you see a giant gear (the one that does not have a bat on it), once you are aligned fall down and loot the Incantation behind the gear's column.[Shadow of the Erdtree Map Link] [Video Location]
